title: Cost Observation (fact_cost_observation)
description: A fuel, freight or logistics cost observation. The benchmark_class field is mandatory and is the contract-level guard against publishing a market benchmark or route proxy as if it were a Thailand shipment quotation (WO-010 Gate F freight rules).

benchmark_class.description: What kind of number this is. 'market_benchmark' and 'route_proxy' are directional market information only. 'actual_quotation' is reserved for a qualified dataset that genuinely quotes shipments, and is not used by any source in this bundle.

quotation_claim.description: Explicit, machine-checkable statement of whether this record may be presented as a shipment quotation. Must be 'not_a_quotation' for every benchmark_class other than 'actual_quotation'.

route_scope.description: The route the benchmark actually covers, e.g. 'Shanghai to North Europe'. Null for non-route series such as retail fuel.

applies_to_thailand.description: Whether the series is measured for Thailand ('measured'), is a global or third-route benchmark used only as directional context ('directional_context_only'), or has no established Thailand relationship ('not_established').
